title: Antigua and Barbuda Passport
metaDescription: Antigua and Barbuda passport ranks 29th place according to the Guide Passport Ranking Index, It provides visa-free access to 150 countries.

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Passport
paragraphs: To obtain Antigua and Barbuda passport through the citizenship by investment program

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Passport
paragraphs: The Antigua and Barbuda passport is the travel document granted to citizens of the dual-island Caribbean nation: a beautiful country located in the West Indies. The Antigua and Barbuda passport allows you to travel to other states and can also serve as a type of official identification. The Antigua passport is a biometric e-passport. Dark blue in color, it features the Antigua crest in gold on its cover, with the country’s official motto, “Each endeavouring, all achieving.”

sections.heading: Validity of the Antigua and Barbuda Passport
paragraphs: The Antigua and Barbuda passport validity is as follows: • Adult citizens (age 16+) who hold a standard Antigua and Barbuda passport: 10 years • Minor citizens (under the age of 16) who hold a standard Antigua and Barbuda passport: 5 years • Citizens through Antigua and Barbuda CBI Program: 5 years for first passport • Citizens through Antigua and Barbuda CBI Program: 10 years for second and all subsequent passports

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Passport Power
paragraphs: The Antigua and Barbuda passport power ranking is 29. This means that the Antigua and Barbuda passport is among the world’s 30 most powerful passports. Antigua and Barbuda passport visa-free travel is another dimension of the Antigua and Barbuda passport power. Antigua and Barbuda passport visa-free travel allow holders to travel without a visa (or with an electronic travel authorization—eTA—or visa on arrival) to 150 countries. The Antigua and Barbuda passport can therefore be used to enter many countries in Europe (the entire 27-country strong Schengen area) much of Asia (including Singapore) and other top destinations, such as Russia and the United Kingdom.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Antigua and Barbuda Passport
paragraphs: Citizens of Antigua and Barbuda may begin the application process for the Antigua passport. The below steps (and the Antigua and Barbuda passport requirements for document submission) are relevant mainly to the pursuit of ordinary adult passports. Minor, official, or diplomatic passport seekers may need to fulfill different Antigua and Barbuda passport requirements. Steps to apply for the Antigua and Barbuda passport:
list: Access the Antigua and Barbuda passport application The main form for the Antigua and Barbuda passport application must be filled out in its entirety. In addition to being signed by the applicant, it must also bear the signature of a licensed notary.

Gather your required documents • Current valid passport and copy of data page (for first-time applicants who hold dual citizenship) • Prior Antigua and Barbuda passport (for non-first-time applicants) • Evidence of Antigua and Barbudan citizenship, either via birth certificate, Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment certificate, or other form • Letter of reference from an Antiguan acquaintance • Certificates of either marriage or divorce (For recently married or divorced applicants) • Police report (For applicants for a stolen/lost Antigua and Barbuda passport)

Arrange Antigua and Barbuda passport photos • Two (2) Antigua passport photos. • Images of applicant must be recently taken (photos taken over six months from application date are not accepted). • Antigua and Barbuda passport measurements: 2 inches by 2 inches. • Antigua and Barbuda passport photo should show applicant facing the camera directly; the face must be clear of accessories or shadows. • The applicant should be photographed in front of a plain background (white). • Antigua passport photo subject should eyes open, mouth closed. • No garments should be visible on the head, and no accessories on the face (including sun lenses). • One of the two Antigua and Barbuda photos should be signed and affixed with a stamp (certified) by the notary the applicant used in step 1.

Submit your Antigua and Barbuda passport fees Applicants may pay different passport fees depending on their age, where they are applying from, and other variables. Those who apply for a basic adult Antigua and Barbuda passport in the normal processing time will pay a standard fee in USD (prices may exclude the cost of shipping and handling, which may present separate and additional costs). Consider that youth applicants and those seeking special types of Antigua and Barbuda passports (as well as those pursuing expediated services) should expect to pay different Antigua and Barbuda passport fees.
Make your Antigua and Barbuda passport application submission Send by mail or follow the procedures at your application destination.

Attend an interview The majority of first-time Antigua and Barbuda passport applicants are required to attend an interview (in person) in order to receive their application. These appointments mainly take place at Antiguan Embassies and Consulates. The above procedures describe how to apply for the Antigua and Barbuda passport. They do not accurately convey how to apply for Antiguan and Barbudan citizenship, which has its own set of requirements. If you are seeking the Antigua and Barbuda passport benefits, your first step will be to apply for citizenship. Only once you have received citizenship through the Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment program, you can seek out your travel document.

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Passport Benefits
paragraphs: Antigua and Barbuda passport benefits available through the Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program can be summarized as follows:
list: Antigua and Barbuda passport power. The Antigua and Barbuda passport is ranked 29th. As one of the top 30 passports in the world, the Antigua and Barbuda passport power is significant: Antigua and Barbuda passport visa-free travel grants access to 150 countries.

Profitable Investment. The Antigua and Barbuda passport is a profitable investment that can be obtained with a one-time payment, thus benefitting its holders with great investment opportunities and tax exemptions

Biometric Antigua and Barbuda travel document. Biometric passports are the most sophisticated and secure type of passports today that guarantee an advanced level of protection against data theft or impersonation
Dual passports. Possibility of holding both Antiguan and Barbuda citizenship and that of another country/countries due to zero restrictions on dual citizenship.

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment and Antigua and Barbuda passport
paragraphs: The Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program offers non-citizens a pathway to an Antigua and Barbuda passport. Successful applicants for Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment become eligible for the Antigua and Barbuda passport and its many benefits. The advantages of Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment are significant. Antigua and Barbuda passport visa-free travel means that those in possession of an Antiguan passport may travel visa free to France, Germany, Italy—and the rest of the EU while enjoying visa free/visa on arrival/e-visa access to top destinations in Asia, South America, and the Middle East. Low-to-no-taxes: Once you have obtained your Antigua and Barbuda passport through Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment, you will enjoy zero taxes on income/wealth and additional reduced tax responsibilities, allowing you to grow your savings. Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment also offers the opportunity for residency rights on beautiful island nation While you do not need to live on Antigua to benefit from the aforementioned economic and travel opportunities, as a citizen of the Antigua and Barbuda citizenship by investment program, you do have the option of residing on the island, which is renowned for being picturesque, safe, and secure. The three options for the Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program are:
list: Donation to the National Development Fund. Donation through the Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program involves a monetary investment in a national fund, which promotes the island’s economic development. All donations must be in cash and are not refundable.

Donation to the University of the West Indies Fund. An investment in the University of the West Indies Fund via the Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program is geared toward applicants with large families (who they are including as dependents on their CBI application). A minimum of six persons (including the main applicant and dependents) is required to apply for this CBI option; should you select it, one of your dependents will be able to attend the University of the West Indies (Antigua’s main university) for free, for up to one year.

Investment in Real Estate on Antigua and Barbuda. The real estate option from the Antigua and Barbuda Citizenship by Investment program involves making an investment in property on the island (in specific real estate which has been set aside by the government for the express purpose of being purchased by a qualifying CBI investor).

sections.heading: Antigua and Barbuda Visa Free Countries
paragraphs: Over the past number of years, the government of Antigua and Barbuda has been successfully working on expanding its list of Visa-free countries
